label: Transparent sedum cluster motif
workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a sedum cluster botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete compact succulent cluster on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact rock-garden sedum cluster with many small bead-like oval succulent leaves packed into low rosettes and trailing tiles, chartreuse and yellow-green leaf bodies, coral-pink leaf tips, subtle pale waxy highlights, natural stone-grey crevices visible between clusters, and muted rock-garden neutral undersides. Botanical accuracy for Sedum, low-growing clustered succulent form, crisp leaf edges, compact tile-like silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full irregular compact cluster without cropping. Slight three-quarter overhead view, clean even studio lighting, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no cactus spines, no aloe spear leaves, no agave, no flowers, no pot, no garden bed outside the cluster, no insects, no hand, no props, no second subject, no text, no watermark, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Sedum light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive LIGHT MODE source board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sedum" / "Sedum". The board must be a wide 4K-class design-system reference, derived from a compact rock-garden sedum cluster motif: bead-like chartreuse succulent leaves, yellow-green leaf bodies, coral-pink tips, waxy highlights, stone-grey crevices, pumice neutrals, and low compact tile-like growth.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Sedum, Sedum, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from a sedum cluster: chartreuse leaves, fresh lime highlights, olive leaf shadows, coral succulent tips, stone grey crevices, pumice and warm rock garden neutrals, compact tile growth. The board must read as sedum in a rock garden, not cactus, aloe, agave, moss, lotus, or generic green SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 多肉, 石庭, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, compact tile dashboard metric cards, data charts, status grid, rock-garden inventory table, filter controls, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, compact tile radius samples, low shadow scale, sedum leaf texture swatches.
Style/medium: premium compact tile-system design language, realistic product UI mockup, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, pale pumice backgrounds, chartreuse primary controls, coral-tip alerts and highlights, stone-grey borders, olive secondary states, tight modular cards, subtle waxy-leaf and gravel texture.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: chartreuse sedum leaves, yellow-green new growth, olive leaf shadow, coral-pink tips, stone grey crevices, pumice neutral, warm rock-garden paper, deep green-grey ink, muted gravel border, restrained coral stress color.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Sedum", no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Sedum dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Sedum" / "Sedum". It must feel like the same compact tile system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the sedum cluster motif and the light-mode board language.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Sedum, Sedum, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the Sedum system language: chartreuse succulent leaf controls, yellow-green new-growth highlights, olive secondary states, coral-pink tip accents, stone-grey borders, pumice neutral text, deep green-grey rock-shadow backgrounds, compact tile clusters, subtle waxy leaf and gravel texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. It must read as Sedum in a rock garden, not cactus, aloe, agave, moss, lotus, or generic dark SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 多肉, 石庭, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, compact tile dashboard metric cards, data charts, status grid, rock-garden inventory table, filter controls, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, compact tile radius samples, low shadow scale, sedum leaf texture swatches.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep green-grey rock shadow, raised cards in basalt and muted gravel, pumice foreground text, chartreuse and yellow-green primary controls, olive active states, coral-tip warnings and selected accents, stone-grey separators, subtle Sedum cluster texture overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: chartreuse sedum leaves, yellow-green new growth, olive leaf shadow, coral-pink tips, stone grey crevices, pumice neutral, warm rock-garden paper, deep green-grey ink, muted gravel border, restrained coral stress color.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Sedum", no illegible microtext.
